title: × festuca rhaetica
intro: × Festuca rhaetica, also known as Rhaetian fescue, is a hybrid grass species that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of × Festuca rhaetica include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and promoting healing. The plant is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and is often used in folk medicine to treat various skin conditions.
